secondary_intents: Produce theme-to-company handoff candidates (CEG, VST, TLN, CCJ, LEU, OKLO)
Test value-capture routing before any single-equity actionability
execution_order: setup -> theme-to-company handoff -> six-lens test -> trigger overlays -> build evidence log -> ordinary-vs-workflow delta -> decision -> refresh plan
market_scope: US-listed public equities plus public/private read-throughs
routing_basis: The topic translates a hot long-term theme into public-company value capture and depends on demand growth, power contracts, regulation, project execution, capital cycle and valuation expectations.
routing_mismatch_risk: A pure industry note could overstate stock actionability; a single-equity memo would be premature without a value-capture and contract/regulatory screen.
followup_questions: Complete an expectation map plus power-contract/regulatory check on CEG/VST before actionability?
Confirm which names are generators vs fuel suppliers vs infrastructure before single-equity handoff?
